description.ko: 침묵의 세계 속 숨겨진 비밀을 밝히기 위해 설계된 차세대 심해 탐사 장치, 아쿠아-5를 만나보세요. 심해의 강력한 수압을 견디며 미지의 영역을 선명하게 비춥니다.
description.en: Experience the ultimate frontier with AQUA-5, a next-generation deep-sea exploration unit designed to withstand the crushing pressures of the abyss while illuminating the mysteries of the silent world.

prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic 8k render of the AQUA-5 submersible drone navigating the dark, abyssal zone of the deep ocean. The drone features sleek metallic surfaces with glowing neon cyan bioluminescent accents. Surrounding it are mysterious deep-sea vents, floating marine snow, and silhouettes of giant squids. The lighting is moody with high contrast, highlighting the textured pressure-resistant hull of the AQUA-5. Ultra-realistic, volumetric lighting, Ray-traced reflections.
